flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 40% at Rose State College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (4.5k vs 7.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Rose State College rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.0k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rose State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
